ddls:
CREATE TABLE "records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "released_year" TEXT /* Year the record was released */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the record */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the label that produced the record */,
  "catalog_number" TEXT /* Catalog number assigned by the label */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the record */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the record (e.g., Vinyl, CD, Digital) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Exact date of release */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist who created the record */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the record is currently active in the catalog */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL to the cover art of the record */,
  "upc_code" TEXT /* Universal Product Code for the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_records_label_id FOREIGN KEY ("label_id") REFERENCES labels ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_records_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the music label */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the label */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the label */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website URL */,
  "founded_year" TEXT /* Year the label was founded */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the label is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography or description of the artist */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the label the artist is signed with */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Artist's birth date */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the artist is from */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the artist is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artists_label_id FOREIGN KEY ("label_id") REFERENCES labels ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record being sold */,
  "units_sold" INTEGER /* Number of units sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated from the sale */,
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the distributor involved in the sale */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales channel used for the sale */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per unit of the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_distributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("distributor_id") REFERENCES distributors ("distributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES records ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES sales_channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distributors" (
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distributor */,
  "distributor_name" TEXT /* Name of the distributor */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the distributor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the distributor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website URL */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the distributor is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record in inventory */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the record */,
  "restock_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was last restocked */,
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the distributor who supplied the inventory */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the inventory */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES records ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_distributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("distributor_id") REFERENCES distributors ("distributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "record_genres" (
  "record_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record-genre association */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_record_genres_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES records ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_record_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff, distributor) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "accessed_record" INTEGER /* ID of the record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_accessed_record FOREIGN KEY ("accessed_record") REFERENCES records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sales channel */,
  "is_online" INTEGER /* Indicates if the channel is online */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for sales through this channel */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the channel is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "record_sales_channels" (
  "record_channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record-sales channel association */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_record_sales_channels_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES sales_channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_record_sales_channels_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record being promoted */,
  "promotion_description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales channel for the promotion */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of discount (e.g., percentage, fixed amount) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the promotion is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES sales_channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES records ("record_id")
)
